zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Helen of Sweden於大約1130年出生在瑞典時，她的父親Swerker I Kettilsson den gamle31歲，母親Ulvhild Håkansdotter31歲。她和Knud Magnussen至少有3個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於大約1158年享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Helen of Sweden was born about 1130, in Sweden, her father, Swerker I Kettilsson den gamle, was 31 and her mother, Ulvhild Håkansdotter, was 31. She had at least 3 sons and 8 daughters with Knud Magnussen. She died about 1158, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Helen of Sweden est née environ 1130, à Suède, son père, Swerker I Kettilsson den gamle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ulvhild Håkansdotter, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles avec Knud Magnussen. Elle est décédée environ 1158, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Helen of Sweden(이)가 대략 1130년 스웨덴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Swerker I Kettilsson den gamle(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ulvhild Håkansdotter(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Knud Magnussen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1158년 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Helen of Sweden родилась около 1130 г. в местности Швеция, её отцу по имени Swerker I Kettilsson den gamle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ulvhild Håkansdotter, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей от Knud Magnussen. Она умерла около 1158 г. в возрасте 30 лет.
